CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, country_code INT, province_code INT);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM test_data ORDER BY province_code ASC, country_code ASC) AS sorted_data;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM test_data ORDER BY province_code DESC, country_code ASC) AS sorted_data;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM test_data WHERE country_code IS NOT NULL ORDER BY province_code ASC) AS sorted_data;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, country_code, province_code FROM test_data WHERE id < 5) AS subquery ORDER BY province_code DESC) AS sorted_data;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY country_code ORDER BY province_code ASC) AS rank FROM test_data) AS ranked_data WHERE rank = 1;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT country_code, COUNT(*) as count FROM test_data WHERE province_code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY country_code) AS country_counts ORDER BY count DESC;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, province_code FROM test_data) AS inner_query ORDER BY province_code ASC) AS double_sorted_data ORDER BY province_code ASC;
